JOBS AND OPPORTUNITIES

In Come By Chance, Braya benefits from an existing employee base that has been part of the prior facility’s successful 50-year operating history as a conventional fuels refinery. In addition to the more than 800 contractor and support positions made available during the conversion, the new facility will provide 200 full-time positions during operation.

Energy industry veterans lead Braya, lending the project their expertise in refining and biofuels operations, trading, and logistics. By harnessing this wealth of talent and knowledge, Braya is in a unique position to take advantage of the exciting opportunities of the renewable energy sector.

To submit your resume or inquire about career opportunities at the refinery,
please contact us at: recruitment@brayafuels.com
